text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Phew… No matter how many times I ride with
Maruzen, her driving always makes me tense
up… Bright, have you ever been in her car?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I have. She was kind enough to invite me
for a drive just the other day.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! So you know what it's like, then — the
sheer speed that makes you feel like you're
going to be thrown out the window!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Those sudden accelerations that almost pop your eyes out! The scenery whooshing by in an instant!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Just thinking about it makes my legs all
wobbly… You know what — maybe her driving
skills are the secret to her incredible running!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Actually… I think I dozed off during our drive.
I can't recall much about it.
